home_price_1bed_usd.method: consensus price/m² (2 sources) × typical apartment size
home_price_1bed_usd.notes: Cross-source consensus of 2 independent sources (expatistan,numbeo): $1197/m² × typical size

home_price_2bed_usd.method: consensus price/m² (2 sources) × typical apartment size
home_price_2bed_usd.notes: Cross-source consensus of 2 independent sources (expatistan,numbeo): $1197/m² × typical size

home_price_3bed_usd.method: consensus price/m² (2 sources) × typical apartment size
home_price_3bed_usd.notes: Cross-source consensus of 2 independent sources (expatistan,numbeo): $1197/m² × typical size

cost_of_living_index.notes: Numbeo Cost of Living Index, excl. rent, NYC=100

local_purchasing_power_index.notes: Numbeo Local Purchasing Power Index, NYC=100

price_to_rent_ratio.notes: Years of 3-bed rent to equal the 3-bed purchase price
